name: Solemnity of the Ascension of the Lord

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Men of Galilee, Why gaze in wonder at the heavens? This Jesus whom you saw ascending into heaven will return as you saw him go. Alleluia.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: God mounts his throne to shouts of joy, a blare of trumpets for the Lord.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Go and teach all nations, says the Lord; I am with you always, until the end of the world.

sections.title: To Live with Him Forever
sections.author: Sarah Hart/Robert Feduccia
sections.snippet: We are the wheat, we are the bread; our lives we bring as offering. And as the grain, we’re crushed by trials yet bound by healing water. The fruit of vine, the work of hands, the cup of love’s endeavor: we place before the Son of Man to live with him forever.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Behold, I am with you always, even to the end of the age, alleluia.

sections.title: All That We Have Seen
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: All that we have seen, we will not hide away. We will hold it up as the light of day, a lamp of mercy meant to guide and lead carried to the least. We will show the world all that we have seen.

sections.title: I, the Lord
sections.author: Tom Kendzia
sections.snippet: I, the Lord, am with you, always by your side. Come and take my hand, for I will lead you home. Follow me, follow me. Follow me, follow me.

sections.title: God is with us
sections.author: Dana Catherine, Sarah Hart, Chris Muglia, and Mary Kate Westrich
sections.snippet: Go out with love, go out to serve, Go out and tell the world that God is with us. Carry your joy to all the earth, Go out and tell the3 world that God is with us.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
